altText: A tall eastern white pine tree with soft green branches against a blue sky
White pine trees with fluffy green needles growing at the edge of a field
Long soft white pine needles that grow in bundles of five
A small white pine branch with long thin green needles
The thick trunk of a white pine covered in rough ridged bark
A long pine cone with open scales lying on the forest floor
Two long slender pine cones resting on mossy ground
Many long pine cones lying on a bed of fallen pine needles
